name: Airmar WX
description: Interface for Airmar WX-series WeatherStations (300WX, 200WX, etc.) over NMEA 0183. Auto-negotiates the serial baud rate, enables required sentences, shows a live dashboard with wind, atmospheric, GPS and attitude data, streams WIMWV (or GPS+heading) to ArduPilot over UDP, and publishes wind/GPS/heading to Cockpit via WebSocket.
